overall.description: A cinematic night scene from a cyberpunk city featuring giant holographic koi fish swimming through the air between neon-lit skyscrapers. The camera begins at street level overlooking a busy intersection, then tilts upward to follow the glowing fish as they swim overhead, eventually focusing on the sky between towering corporate buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with holographic advertisements

events.description: giant orange holographic koi fish materializes and begins swimming toward the camera from the center of the intersection
camera begins tilting upward to track the approaching holographic fish

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated position observing the street intersection and emerging holographic fish

entered.detail: giant glowing orange holographic koi fish swimming through the air
tall dark skyscraper with circular white logo near the top
tall building with vertical yellow lighting strips and red neon accents
tower with vertical yellow neon lines and illuminated windows
busy multi-lane road with moving traffic and street lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a neon-lit cyberpunk city intersection at night, with traffic moving along the streets below. A massive orange holographic koi fish materializes in the distance and swims toward the camera, prompting the viewpoint to begin tilting upward to track its movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: airspace between downtown skyscrapers with holographic displays

events.description: blue holographic koi fish enters the frame from the left, swimming toward the center
camera continues tilting upward, now viewing the fish from below as they cross overhead

agents.ego_description: tracking both holographic fish as they swim overhead between the towering buildings

notable_agents.action: flying car passes overhead between the skyscrapers

entered.detail: giant glowing blue holographic koi fish with flowing fins
red neon sign reading METROSYSTEM on the center building facade
futuristic flying car passing between buildings

segments.scene_description: As the camera tilts upward, a second blue holographic koi fish joins the orange one, both swimming gracefully overhead between the neon-lit skyscrapers. The street falls out of view as the perspective shifts to focus on the airspace between towers, with a flying vehicle passing by in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical canyon between corporate skyscrapers looking toward open sky

events.description: both holographic koi fish swim out of the frame to the sides
view completes transition to pure skyward perspective between the towering buildings

agents.ego_description: stationary upward gaze at the night sky between skyscrapers, watching for flying vehicles

segments.scene_description: The holographic fish exit the frame, leaving a serene upward view of the night sky framed by the towering corporate skyscrapers. The camera stabilizes on this vertical canyon perspective, with the METROSYSTEM sign glowing red on the center tower and occasional flying vehicles passing through the narrow sky gap.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous upward tilt from a bustling cyberpunk intersection toward the narrow sky gap between towering corporate skyscrapers. It begins at street level amidst neon lights and moving traffic, where a massive orange holographic koi fish materializes in the distance and swims toward the viewer. As the camera tilts upward to track the creature, a second blue holographic koi joins the first, gliding gracefully overhead while the street below falls out of view and a distant flying vehicle passes by. The scene then shifts focus entirely to the airspace between the towers as the fish exit the frame, leaving a serene vertical perspective of the night sky. Finally, the camera stabilizes on this urban canyon, framing a glowing red METROSYSTEM sign on a central tower as occasional vehicles drift through the dark void.
